judgment.summary: eBay shows solid revenue growth and strong margins, but carries significant debt relative to its equity.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 5.0%; next earnings date is 2026-07-29.
positives: Revenue growth 19.5% YoY indicates strong top-line expansion.
Profit margin 17.6% and Operating margin 23.1% demonstrate healthy profitability.
Return on equity 42.9% is very strong, showing efficient use of shareholder capital.
Forward P/E of 17.33x suggests reasonable valuation relative to future earnings expectations.
negatives: Debt/Equity ratio of 163.33 is high, indicating substantial leverage.
Total debt $7.21B significantly outweighs total cash $3.86B.
PEG ratio of 1.86 suggests the stock may be somewhat overvalued relative to its earnings growth.
Analyst consensus is 'hold' with a mean target price below the current spot price.

news.paragraph: The recent headlines for eBay are unrelated to the company's business operations or financial performance, focusing instead on the passing of Ittai Gradel, known for his work at the British Museum. This news has no bearing on eBay's stock or its upcoming catalysts. Traders should focus on the company's fundamentals and upcoming earnings report for any directional signals.

headlines.title: Ittai Gradel, Who Discovered Massive Thefts at the British Museum, Dies at 61
